Meaning.Vi: Alfred (tên riêng, thường là tên nam)
Meaning.En: A male given name of Old English origin, meaning "elf counsel" or "wise counselor".
Meaning.Example: Alfred the Great was a 9th-century King of Wessex who defended England against Viking invasions.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để gọi một người đàn ông có tên Alfred, thường gặp trong văn hóa phương Tây.
Situation.En: Used to refer to a man named Alfred, commonly found in Western contexts.
